chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 184 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.776/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 18.04.2024 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioners does not press this petition with permission to file a fresh one, if need arises. In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
